mods.name: Performance Air Filter
mods.description: Drop-in replacement filter for the stock airbox. Improves airflow to the mid-mounted flat-6 with zero risk of CEL or fitment issues.
mods.installNotes: Access the airbox from the rear trunk area. Unclip the airbox lid and swap filters. No tools required. 5 minute job.

mods.name: Sport Exhaust System
mods.description: Aftermarket exhaust unleashes the mid-engine flat-6 bark that the stock mufflers suppress. Huge improvement in character with minimal drone.
mods.partNumbers: Fabspeed Supercup, Soul Performance Products Valved Exhaust
mods.installNotes: Unbolt rear mufflers at the flange. Hang new system on factory rubber mounts. If valved, wire controller to a dash switch or use Bluetooth remote. 1 hour install.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Drop the ride height 20–25mm for improved mid-engine balance and aggressive stance without sacrificing daily drivability.
mods.installNotes: Spring swap at all corners. PASM-equipped cars retain full functionality. Alignment required. Expect roughly equal drop front and rear.

mods.name: Performance Headers
mods.description: Long-tube equal-length headers extract significant power from the flat-6, particularly in the mid-range and top-end where it matters most.
mods.partNumbers: Soul Performance Race Headers, Fabspeed 987 Long Tube
mods.installNotes: Engine must be partially dropped for header access. Pre-soak all bolts. Expect 15–25hp gains. May require ECU tune to clear O2 sensor codes. 6+ hour job.

mods.name: ECU Tune
mods.description: Optimize the flat-6 engine maps for improved throttle response, rev limit increase, and 15–20hp gains across the powerband.
mods.partNumbers: GIAC Stage 1 Tune, Softronic Performance Calibration
mods.installNotes: ECU removed and bench-flashed, or done via OBD-II with Cobb AccessPort on supported models. Requires 93+ octane. Pairs well with headers and exhaust.

mods.name: Adjustable Coilovers
mods.description: Full coilover kit designed for the mid-engine platform with adjustable ride height and damping. Transforms the Cayman into a genuine track weapon.
mods.partNumbers: Ohlins Road & Track BMS MI10, KW V3 35271018
mods.installNotes: Replace full strut assemblies. Disable PASM if equipped. Set initial damping to 60% of full stiff. Corner balance is critical on a mid-engine car. Professional alignment required.

mods.name: 3.8L Engine Conversion
mods.description: Bore and stroke the 2.7L or 3.4L flat-6 to 3.8L using 997 GT3 components for a massive increase in displacement and power output.
mods.partNumbers: 997 GT3 3.8 cylinders, Mahle 997 GT3 pistons, LN Engineering IMS bearing
mods.installNotes: Full engine-out teardown. Bore cylinders, install GT3 pistons and rods. Address IMS bearing during build. Requires custom ECU tune. Budget 60+ hours including machine work.

mods.name: Lightweight Flywheel and Clutch
mods.description: A lightweight flywheel and upgraded clutch improve throttle response and rev matching. The flat-6 spins up noticeably faster with less rotating mass.
mods.partNumbers: Sachs Performance Clutch Kit, JB Racing Lightweight Flywheel
mods.installNotes: Transmission must be dropped for access. Replace flywheel, clutch disc, pressure plate, and throw-out bearing as a set. Resurface or replace rear main seal while apart.
